/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/GrainFreeze_Standalone.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/GrainFreeze_Standalone.dir/home/shamanic/dev/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GrainFreeze_Standalone.dir/home/shamanic/dev/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GrainFreeze_Standalone.dir/home/shamanic/dev/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_ARA.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GrainFreeze_Standalone.dir/home/shamanic/dev/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_LV2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GrainFreeze_Standalone.dir/home/shamanic/dev/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Standalone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GrainFreeze_Standalone.dir/home/shamanic/dev/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Unity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GrainFreeze_Standalone.dir/home/shamanic/dev/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GrainFreeze_Standalone.dir/home/shamanic/dev/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST3.cpp.o -o "GrainFreeze_artefacts/Release/Standalone/Grain Freeze"  "GrainFreeze_artefacts/Release/libGrain Freeze_SharedCode.a" /usr/lib/libasound.so /usr/lib/libfontconfig.so /usr/lib/libfreetype.so -lrt -ldl -lpthread -flto
